true_desc_levels.1: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
true_desc_levels.1_kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>의 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
true_desc_levels.1_zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>的几率使目标<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
true_desc_levels.2: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.

true_desc_levels.1: Heals the selected ally's Health by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: 味方単体のHPを<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>回復させる。
true_desc_levels.1_zh: 使所选友军的生命值恢复<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>。
true_desc_levels.2: Heals the selected ally's Health by <color=#28d9ed>25%</color>.
true_desc_levels.2_jp: 味方単体のHPを<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>回復させる。
true_desc_levels.2_zh: 使所选友军的生命值恢复<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>。
true_desc_levels.3: Heals the selected ally's Health by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>.
true_desc_levels.3_jp: 味方単体のHPを<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>回復させる。
true_desc_levels.3_zh: 使所选友军的生命值恢复<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>。
true_desc_levels.4: Heals the selected ally's Health by <color=#28d9ed>35%</color>.
true_desc_levels.4_jp: 味方単体のHPを<color=#28d9ed>35%</color>回復させる。
true_desc_levels.4_zh: 使所选友军的生命值恢复<color=#28d9ed>35%</color>。
true_desc_levels.5: Heals the selected ally's Health by <color=#28d9ed>40%</color>.

true_desc_levels.5_zh: 使所选友军的生命值恢复<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>。

SKT_BURST_2.effect: Effects are applied to all allies

SKT_BURST_3.effect_jp: 【治療を開始する。】の\nスキルターン-2ターン

true_desc_levels.1: Heals all allies's Health by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> and grants a <color=#28d9ed>Barrier</color> that absorbs <color=#28d9ed>300</color> damage for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: 味方全体のHPを<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>回復させ、<color=#28d9ed>300</color>の<color=#28d9ed>シールド</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
true_desc_levels.1_kr: 아군 전체의 체력을 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 회복시키고, <color=#28d9ed>300</color>의 <color=#28d9ed>실드</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 부여합니다.
true_desc_levels.1_zh: 使全体友军的生命值恢复<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,并获得<color=#28d9ed>300</color><color=#28d9ed>护盾</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
true_desc_levels.2: Heals all allies's Health by <color=#28d9ed>23%</color> and grants a <color=#28d9ed>Barrier</color> that absorbs <color=#28d9ed>300</color> damage for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.

true_desc_levels.5: Heals all allies's Health by <color=#28d9ed>35%</color> and grants a <color=#28d9ed>Barrier</color> that absorbs <color=#28d9ed>1500</color> damage for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
true_desc_levels.5_jp: 味方全体のHPを<color=#28d9ed>35%</color>回復させ、<color=#28d9ed>1500</color>の<color=#28d9ed>シールド</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。

true_desc_levels.1: <color=#ffd732>Chain Finish Effect</color>: After attacking, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to grant Barriers to all allies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>. The Barrier strength increases proportional to the target's Health.\n\n<color=#ffd732>Dual Attack Effect</color>: After attacking, has a <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: <color=#ffd732>チェーン効果(トドメ)</color>:攻撃後、味方全体に<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率でシールドを<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。対象のHPが高いほど、シールド量がUPする。\n\n<color=#ffd732>連携効果</color>:攻撃後、<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
true_desc_levels.1_kr: <color=#ffd732>체인 피니시 효과</color> : 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color>의 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 아군 전체에게 실드를 부여합니다. 실드량은 대상의 체력에 비례합니다.\n\n<color=#ffd732>협공 효과</color> : 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>40%</color>의 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 적 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 감소시킵니다.
true_desc_levels.1_zh: <color=#ffd732>连携收尾效果</color>:攻击后,有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率使全体友军获得护盾效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。护盾量与目标的生命值成正比。\n\n<color=#ffd732>夹攻效果</color>:攻击后,有<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>的几率使敌人的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
true_desc_levels.2: <color=#ffd732>Chain Finish Effect</color>: After attacking, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to grant Barriers to all allies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>. The Barrier strength increases proportional to the target's Health.\n\n<color=#ffd732>Dual Attack Effect</color>: After attacking, has a <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.

true_desc_levels.5_kr: <color=#ffd732>체인 피니시 효과</color> : 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color>의 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 아군 전체에게 실드를 부여합니다. 실드량은 대상의 체력에 비례합니다.\n\n<color=#ffd732>협공 효과</color> : 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>40%</color>의 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 적 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 감소시킵니다.
true_desc_levels.5_zh: <color=#ffd732>连携收尾效果</color>:攻击后,有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率使全体友军获得护盾效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。护盾量与目标的生命值成正比。\n\n<color=#ffd732>夹攻效果</color>:攻击后,有<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>的几率使敌人的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
